w:r.w:t: PublisherServiceTest
Project: Book Partner Portal
Class Under Test: com.capg.portal.creator.service.PublisherService
Testing Frameworks: JUnit 5, Mockito
Total Tests Executed: 19 / 19
Pass Rate: 100%
Coverage Scope: CRUD Flows, Defaults, Validation, Not Found Handling, Filter Queries, Relational Traversal.
1. Creation Operations (createPublisher)
TC-01 | Successful Creation | Valid Publisher payload with new pubId | Saves publisher and returns entity | Pass
TC-02 | Duplicate Publisher | Existing pubId already present | Throws ResourceAlreadyExistsException | Pass
TC-03 | Null Input | publisher = null | Throws NullPointerException | Pass
TC-04 | Default Country Processing | country is null on create | Defaults country to USA before save | Pass
2. Read Operations
TC-05 | Fetch All Publishers | Standard invocation | Returns full List<Publisher> | Pass
TC-06 | Fetch By ID (Happy Flow) | Existing pubId | Returns matching Publisher | Pass
TC-07 | Fetch By ID (Sad Flow) | Non-existent pubId | Throws ResourceNotFoundException | Pass
3. Update Operations (updatePublisher - PUT)
TC-08 | Successful Full Update | Existing pubId with new values | Replaces values and normalizes blank country to USA | Pass
TC-09 | Update Target Not Found | Non-existent pubId | Throws ResourceNotFoundException | Pass
4. Patch Operations (patchPublisher - PATCH)
TC-10 | Successful Partial Update | Existing pubId with partial fields | Updates only provided fields and saves | Pass
TC-11 | Patch Target Not Found | Non-existent pubId | Throws ResourceNotFoundException | Pass
5. Filter Operations
TC-12 | Filter by City | Valid city (Mumbai) | Returns matching List<Publisher> | Pass
TC-13 | Filter by City (No Data) | City with no matches | Returns empty list | Pass
6. Relational Hops (Foreign Key Traversal)
TC-14 | Fetch Employees by Publisher | Valid pubId | Returns List<Employee> mapped to publisher | Pass
TC-15 | Employees by Publisher (Not Found) | Invalid pubId | Throws ResourceNotFoundException | Pass
TC-16 | Fetch Authors by Publisher | Valid pubId with titles/authors | Returns deduced List<Author> | Pass
TC-17 | Fetch Authors by Publisher (No Data) | Valid pubId but no title-author rows | Returns empty list | Pass
TC-18 | Fetch Stores by Publisher | Valid pubId with titles/sales | Returns deduced List<Store> | Pass
TC-19 | Fetch Stores by Publisher (No Data) | Valid pubId but no sales rows | Returns empty list | Pass
